title: aspidium microcarpum
intro: Aspidium microcarpum, also known as the Aspidium fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Aspidium microcarpum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
